name: FortiNDRCloud
description: This app allows the use of the information provided by the FortiNDR Cloud Service to perform containment and investigative actions on Splunk SOAR

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Retrieve latest Detections from the FortiNDR Cloud Service

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: First Poll (<number> <time unit>, e.g., 12 hours, 7 days)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter Ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Parameter Ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Parameter Ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter Ignored in this app

actions.name: Get Sensors
actions.description: Get a list of all sensors

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: UUID of account to filter by

parameters.name: account_code
parameters.description: Account code to filter by

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: ID of the sensor to filter by

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include additional metadata such as status, interfaces, admin.sensor, admin.zeek, admin.suricata, and network_usage

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Filter by true or false. If not provided, all the sensors are returned

actions.name: Get Devices
actions.description: Get a list of all devices

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter devices based on when they were seen

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter devices based on when they were seen

parameters.name: cidr
parameters.description: Filter devices that are under a specific CIDR

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Filter devices that were observed by a specific sensor

parameters.name: traffic_direction
parameters.description: Filter devices that have been noted to only have a certain directionality of traffic ("external" vs "internal")

actions.name: Get Tasks
actions.description: Get a list of all the PCAP tasks

parameters.name: task_uuid
parameters.description: Filter to a specific task

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the task

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Account where the task will be created

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the task

parameters.name: bpf
parameters.description: The Berkeley Packet Filter for capture filtering

parameters.name: requested_start_date
parameters.description: The date the task will become active. (2019-01-30T00:00:00.000Z)

parameters.name: requested_end_date
parameters.description: The date the task will become inactive. (2019-12-31T23:59:59.000Z)

parameters.name: sensor_ids
parameters.description: List of sensor IDs, separated by ',', on which this task will run (separate multiple accounts by comma)

actions.name: Get Telemetry Events
actions.description: Get event telemetry data grouped by time

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Interval to group by: hour (default) or day

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date/time to query for. The default is 1 day ago for interval=hour or 30 days ago for interval=day

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date/time to query for. The default is the current time

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Account uuid to filter by

parameters.name: account_code
parameters.description: Account code to filter by

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Sensor id to filter by

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: The type of event

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Optionally group results by: sensor_id, event_type

actions.name: Get Telemetry Packetstats
actions.description: Get packetstats telemetry data grouped by time

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Aggregation interval. default by hour if not specified

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Scopes the returned metrics to dates after the given start_date. If empty returns most current packet stats

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Scopes the returned metrics to dates before the given end_date. If empty returns most current packet stats

parameters.name: account_code
parameters.description: Account code to filter by

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Scopes the returned metrics to the interfaces of the specified sensor ID

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Option to group by the following fields: interface_name, sensor_id, account_code

actions.name: Get Telemetry Network
actions.description: Get network telemetry data grouped by time

parameters.name: account_code
parameters.description: Account code to filter by

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The interval to filter by (day, month_to_day)

parameters.name: latest_each_month
parameters.description: Filters out all but the latest day and month_to_date for each month

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sorts by account code first, then timestamp. asc or desc. The default is desc

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to return, default: 100, max: 1000

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of records to skip past. Default: 0

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date to filter by

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date to filter by

actions.name: Get Entity Summary
actions.description: Get summary information about an IP or domain

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Entity name to retrieve summary information for

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Type of the entity we are searching. Allowed values are: ip, domain or file

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Account uuid to filter by. If absent, all the caller's allowed accounts will be queried

actions.name: Get Entity Pdns
actions.description: Get passive DNS information about an IP or domain

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: IP or Domain to get passive DNS data for

parameters.name: record_type
parameters.description: Limit results to the specified DNS query type(s). Supported types are: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS. Case insensitive

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Limit the results to the specified data source(s). Note that not all Sources populate all fields. Supported sources are: ICEBRG_DNS. Case insensitive

parameters.name: resolve_external
parameters.description: When true, the service will query non-ICEBRG data sources. false by default

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The earliest date before which to exclude results. Day granularity, inclusive

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The latest date after which to exclude results. Day granularity, inclusive

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Limit results to the specified account UUID(s). Defaults to all accounts for which the user has permission

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to be returned. Default 1000

actions.name: Get Entity Dhcp
actions.description: Get DHCP information about an IP address

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: IP to get DHCP data for

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The earliest date before which to exclude results. Day granularity, inclusive

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The latest date after which to exclude results. Day granularity, inclusive

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Limit results to the specified account UUID(s). Defaults to all accounts for which the user has permission

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: File hash. Can be an MD5, SHA1, or SHA256 hash of the file

parameters.name: rule_uuid
parameters.description: Filter to a specific rule

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: For those with access to multiple accounts, specify a single account to return results from

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by detection status: active, resolved

parameters.name: device_ip
parameters.description: Device IP to filter by

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Sensor ID to filter by

parameters.name: muted
parameters.description: List detections that a user muted: true / false

parameters.name: muted_device
parameters.description: List detections for muted devices: true / false

parameters.name: muted_rule
parameters.description: List detections for muted rules

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include additional information in the response (i.e. 'rules,indicators' add the rules and the indicators to the response)

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort by (first_seen, last_seen, status, device_ip, indicator_count)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort direction ('asc' vs 'desc')

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of records to skip past

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of records to return, default: 100, max: 10000

parameters.name: created_start_date
parameters.description: Created start date to filter by (inclusive)

parameters.name: created_end_date
parameters.description: Created end date to filter by (exclusive)

parameters.name: created_or_shared_start_date
parameters.description: Created or shared start date to filter by (inclusive)

parameters.name: created_or_shared_end_date
parameters.description: Created or shared end date to filter by (exclusive)

parameters.name: active_start_date
parameters.description: Active start date to filter by (inclusive)

parameters.name: active_end_date
parameters.description: Active end date to filter by (exclusive)

actions.name: Get Detection Rules
actions.description: Get a list of detection rules

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: For those with access to multiple accounts, specify a single account to return results from

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter name or category

parameters.name: has_detections
parameters.description: Include rules that have unmuted, unresolved detections

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: high, moderate, low

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.description: Filter by confidence: high, moderate, low

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category to filter by

parameters.name: rule_account_muted
parameters.description: Include muted rules: true / false

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Enabled rules only

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The field to sort by: created, updated, detections, severity, confidence, category, last_seen, detections_muted. Defaults to updated

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort direction ('asc' vs 'desc')

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of records to skip past

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of records to return, default: 100, max: 1000

parameters.name: detection_uuid
parameters.description: Detection UUID to resolve

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Resolution state. Options: true_positive_mitigated, true_positive_no_action, false_positive, unknown'

parameters.name: resolution_comment
parameters.description: Optional comment for the resolution

actions.name: Get Rule Events
actions.description: Get a list of the events that matched on a specific rule

parameters.name: rule_uuid
parameters.description: Rule UUID to get events for

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Account uuid to filter by

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of records to skip past

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of records to return, default: 100, max: 1000

actions.name: Get Detection Events
actions.description: Get a list of the events associated with a specific detection

parameters.name: detection_uuid
parameters.description: Detection uuid to filter by

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of records to skip past

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of records to return, default: 100, max: 1000

parameters.name: account_uuid
parameters.description: Account where the rule will be created

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the rule

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: The category of the rule

parameters.name: query_signature
parameters.description: The IQL query for the rule

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the rule

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity of the rule

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.description: The confidence of the rule

parameters.name: primary_attack_id
parameters.description: Primary Attack ID

parameters.name: secondary_attack_id
parameters.description: Secondary Attack ID

parameters.name: specificity
parameters.description: Specificity

parameters.name: device_ip_fields
parameters.description: List, separated by ',', of the fields to check for impacted devices. Using 'DEFAULT' if not provided

parameters.name: indicator_fields
parameters.description: List, separated by ',' of the indicator's fields

parameters.name: run_account_uuids
parameters.description: Account UUIDs on which this rule will run. This will usually be just your own account UUID. (separate multiple accounts by comma)

parameters.name: auto_resolution_minutes
parameters.description: The number of minutes after which detections will be auto-resolved. If 0 then detections have to be manually resolved
